[et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-faq" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

FAQ

Common Inquiries

Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about our services and processes.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_toggle title="Why does pricing start at $5,800?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

This includes professional video setup, custom plugin installation, consulting, and studio-style layout work. Each platform is built with care to ensure it meets professional network standards.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="Do I own my website and content?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Yes. You fully own your site and all content. Unlike platforms that charge monthly fees and hold your content hostage, your platform is built for you to own and operate independently forever.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="Do you provide hosting or domains?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

No, but we assist with setup and provide recommendations for reliable hosting providers. This keeps you in control of your infrastructure and costs.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="Do you host videos?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

No, we connect your videos using professional players or platforms like Bunny.net. This gives you flexibility and control over your video hosting costs and performance.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="What if I don't have thumbnails or artwork?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Thumbnail and artwork creation is available as an add-on service. We can create professional thumbnails, show artwork, and promotional graphics that match your brand.

[/et_pb_toggle][et_pb_toggle title="What do I need for consulting calls?" open="off" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Consulting calls must be attended on a desktop or laptop browser for optimal screen sharing. Mobile devices and tablets are not supported for these sessions.

[/et_pb_toggle][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
